description_long: This object is a cylindrical white candle with a smooth, slightly translucent wax body and a gently uneven rim at the top. The candle features a visible flame and a short wick at its center, giving the impression that it is currently lit. The wax body is thick and opaque, with no visible wax drips or melted areas on the surface, suggesting it is relatively new or unused. The flame is small and realistic, with a yellow-orange hue, and is set against a dark background for contrast. There is no external holder or decorative base; the candle stands freely on its own. Its design is simple and modern, making it suitable for urban environments such as outdoor cafes, parks, or public event spaces.
description: A smooth, white cylindrical candle with a visible flame and wick, featuring a clean, modern design and no external holder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle's open top, visible flame, and wick centered within the wax body.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the candle's smooth, cylindrical shape and slightly uneven rim, with no flame or wick visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the candle with the dark background of the flame just barely visible above the rim.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting the candle's gentle rim contour and solid wax body, with no flame or wick visible.
